/usr/bin/c++  -std=c++17 -Wno-deprecated-builtins -O3 -DNDEBUG CMakeFiles/SwapDaemon.dir/SwapDaemon/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SwapDaemon.dir/SwapDaemon/AdaptorSwap.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SwapDaemon.dir/SwapDaemon/FuegoRpcClient.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SwapDaemon.dir/SwapDaemon/PriceOracle.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SwapDaemon.dir/SwapDaemon/SwapDaemon.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SwapDaemon.dir/SwapDaemon/SwapP2P.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SwapDaemon.dir/SwapDaemon/Monero/MoneroRpcClient.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SwapDaemon.dir/SwapDaemon/Monero/AdaptorSignature.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SwapDaemon.dir/SwapDaemon/Ethereum/EthRpcClient.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SwapDaemon.dir/SwapDaemon/Ethereum/ContractAbi.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SwapDaemon.dir/SwapDaemon/BitcoinCash/BchRpcClient.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SwapDaemon.dir/SwapDaemon/BitcoinCash/HtlcScript.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SwapDaemon.dir/SwapDaemon/Solana/SolRpcClient.cpp.o -o xfg-swap   -L/home/ar/Downloads/fuego-suite-transferable-cd-fee-pool/build-check/src/src/FuegoTor  -Wl,-rpath,/home/ar/Downloads/fuego-suite-transferable-cd-fee-pool/build-check/src/src/FuegoTor libSwapDaemonLib.a libCrypto.a libCommon.a libLogging.a libCrypto.a libCommon.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libboost_system.so.1.74.0 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libboost_filesystem.so.1.74.0 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libboost_date_time.so.1.74.0 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libboost_regex.so.1.74.0 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libboost_serialization.so.1.74.0 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libboost_program_options.so.1.74.0 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libboost_coroutine.so.1.74.0 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libboost_context.so.1.74.0 -lrt /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libssl.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcrypto.so -lresolv /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libboost_thread.so.1.74.0 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libboost_chrono.so.1.74.0 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libboost_atomic.so.1.74.0
